title: centella annua
intro: Centella annua, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Centella annua include improved cognitive function, reduced anxiety and stress, and enhanced skin health due to its high content of triterpenoid saponins. Centella annua can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is commonly used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
